title: NPM1-mutated AML
question: Which statement is correct regarding NPM1-mutated AML?
options: NPM1 mutation defines a distinct AML entity in current classifications.
NPM1 always coexists with TP53 mutation.
correct_answer: A. NPM1 mutation defines a distinct AML entity in current classifications.
explanation: NPM1-mutated AML is a genetically defined entity; interpretation should be integrated with co-mutations such as FLT3-ITD.
references: WHO Classification of Haematolymphoid Tumours, 5th edition
